Cd100.Migrate.Title: Update required
Cd100.Migrate.Message:
Your world requires an update to run version {version}.
Please backup your world folder before starting the upgrade.
If you do not update your world the system will not work correctly.
The world may be restarted when completed.
Cd100.Migrate.WithModulesMessage:
Your world or modules may require an update to run version {version}.
Please backup your world and module folders listed below before starting the upgrade.
If you do not update your world the system will not work correctly.
The following modules contain actors or items so will also be checked.
{modules}
The world may be restarted when completed.
Cd100.Migrate.GMRequired:
Your world requires an update to run version {version}.
Please wait for your GM to update the system then refresh (F5) this page.

Cd100.Settings.HouseRules.Hint: Configure common house rules and reorder characteristics
Cd100.Settings.PulpRules.DevelopmentRoll: Increase luck for failed and successful luck development roll
Cd100.Settings.PulpRules.Archetype.Name: Pulp Archetypes
Cd100.Settings.PulpRules.Talents.Name: Pulp Talents
Natural healing is increased to two hit points per day
Cd100.Settings.PulpRules.IgnoreAgePenalt: Do not alter movement rate based on age. When using the investigator wizard improvements and characteristic adjustments are not made
Cd100.Settings.PulpRules.LuckSpent.Title: Using Luck
Cd100.Settings.PulpRules.LuckMalfunction: Ignore Weapon Fumble or Malfunction Consequences
Cd100.Settings.PulpRules.LuckHeal.Name: It's Only a Scratch!
Cd100.Settings.DDTRules.ShootingWithOffH: Shooting with off-hand adds a penalty die.
Cd100.Settings.DholeUpload.Directory.Nam: The Dhole's House image upload directory
Cd100.Settings.DholeUpload.Directory.Hin: Upload path for The Dhole's House avatars, relative to the Foundry/Data directory.
Cd100.Settings.WorldEra.Name: Era for the world
Cd100.Settings.WorldEra.Hint: Skills can vary slightly between eras, please select the era for this world so system searches for skills find the correct ones.
Cd100.Settings.ShowWorldEra.Name: Show World Era in players list
Cd100.Settings.AllowPushFumbles.Name: Allow fumbles to be pushed
Cd100.Settings.AllowPushFumbles.Hint: If a roll is pushable and the result was a fumble after dealing with the fumble consequences, allow the roll to be pushed.
Cd100.Settings.CharacteristicsOrder.Name: Characteristics Order
Cd100.Settings.CharacteristicsOrder.Hint: There are many minor changes to the characteristics order. Drag these into the order for this world.
Cd100.Settings.DropCoCID.Name: Use CoC ID on item drops
Cd100.Settings.DropCoCID.Hint: When dropping items with a CoC ID prompt to store the CoC ID instead of the item
Cd100.Settings.DropCoCID.Dialog: Use the CoC ID for dropped items where possible? This allows the system to select the correct item for your world era.
Cd100.Settings.DropCoCID.Remember: Remember this selection, you can change this under settings
Cd100.UnableToUploadDholeImage: You do not have permission to upload images, if you import the default avatar will be used.

• Left click roll check with options
  • Shift + Left click Immediate regular difficulty roll
  • Right click Opposed check with options
  • Shift + Right click Immediate opposed check
  • Alt/Option + Right click Combined check with options
  • Shift + Alt/Option + Right click Immediate combined check

• Left click roll check with options
  • Shift + Left click Immediate regular difficulty roll
Cd100.ToolTipKeeperSkill:
• Ctrl + Left click Create roll link
  • Shift + Ctrl + Left click Create roll link with modifiers
    • {other}
Cd100.ToolTipSanity:
• Left click roll check with options
  • Alt/Option + Left click roll sanity loss with options
  • Shift + Left click Immediate regular difficulty roll
  • Shift + Alt/Option + Left click roll sanity loss without dice pool options
  • Right click Opposed check with options
  • Shift + Right click Immediate opposed check
  • Alt/Option + Right click Combined check with options
  • Shift + Alt/Option + Right click Immediate combined check

• Left click roll check with options
  • Shift + Left click Immediate regular difficulty roll
  • Right click Combat opposed maneuver with options
  • Shift + Right click Immediate combat opposed maneuver
Cd100.ToolTipKeeperSanity: • Ctrl + Alt/Option Create sanity check roll link
Cd100.ToolTipAutoToggle: • Left click Toggle automatic calculation / manual entry
SETTINGS.DefaultDifficultyHint: You can choose the default difficulty for checks. Unknown will roll checks without the player knowing the check difficulty.
SETTINGS.showIconsOnly: On summarized sheet, show only icons on skills list.
SETTINGS.hidePartValues: On investigator sheet only show half and extreme values when hovering over
SETTINGS.UseTokenHint: Use token image instead of portraits in chat cards
SETTINGS.TrustedCanModifyChatCard: Allow trusted user to modify chat card
SETTINGS.TrustedCanModifyChatCardHint: Enabling this setting will give permission to trusted users to select options on chat card. The GM only section will still not be visible to them
SETTINGS.TrustedCanSeeChatCard: Allow trusted user to see GM only sections
SETTINGS.TrustedCanSeeChatCardHint: Enabling this setting will give permission to trusted users to see GM only section on chat card. Use this with caution!
SETTINGS.DisplayActorOnCardHint: Display the actor's image/token on combat chat cards
SETTINGS.InitiativeRuleHint: You can select basic initiative rule (using DEX value) or optional rule (using a roll)
SETTINGS.displayInitDicesHint: Display the dices when rolling for initiative (Optional rules only)
SETTINGS.displayInitAsTextHint: Display initiative as text instead of number (Optional rules only)
SETTINGS.PulpRulesHint: Alow the usage of Pulp Rules (Archetype, Talent, HP), !early implementation!
SETTINGS.developmentRollForLuckHint: Each player can make an improvement check for their Luck on Development Phase
SETTINGS.allowMythosHardenedHint: Allow Mythos Hardened sanity loss reductions
SETTINGS.DisregardAmmoHint: Enabling this will not take in account the number of bullets loaded in the gun.
SETTINGS.DisregardUsePerRoundHint: Enabling this will allow you to fire as much as you want, regardless of the uses per round of the weapon.
SETTINGS.DoNotPromptNoTargetSelected: Do not prompt that no targets are selected
SETTINGS.DoNotPromptNoTargetSelectedHit: When rolling weapon attacks without tokens do not request confirmation of no targets
SETTINGS.RestrictGridSpacesHint: For range combat, if selected the distances will be measured in grid spaces, if not the 'real' (euclidean) distance will be used.
SETTINGS.StatusPlayerEditableHint: Let your player modify their status (prone, unconscious, dying, dead) and reset their daily SAN loss
SETTINGS.TenDieBonusHint: When using DsN, colorset to use for ten bonus dice. (leave blank to use player default)
SETTINGS.TenDiePenaltyHint: When using DsN, colorset to use for penalty bonus dice. (leave blank to use player default)
SETTINGS.OverrideGameArtworkHint: !!RESTART REQUIRED!! gives access to advance game config, leave blank for default
SETTINGS.StandbyGMRollsHint: When the Keeper is making a roll from an assigned character sheet, display a roll button instead of rolling
SETTINGS.AllowFlatDiceModifierHint: Allows dice roll results to be modified by a flat value.
SETTINGS.AllowFlatThresholdModifierHint: Allows checks success value to be modified by a flat value.
SETTINGS.OpposedRollTieBreakerHint: In case of a tie during opposed roll, winner is determined by highest rolled value, not higher skill.
SETTINGS.SelfRollWhisperTargetHint: As a GM, when doing self check roll, who do you want to send a notification to.
SETTINGS.OneBlockBackStoryHint: Turn backstory to one editor block, but you can format/add links.
SETTINGS.UseIconForErasHint: Show icons for era toggles to save space.
SETTINGS.TokenDropModeHint: Define the default behavior when an NPC with rollable characteristics or skills is dropped on a scene.
SETTINGS.EnableStatusIconsHint: Set if combat and sanity effects icons are shown in tokens.
SETTINGS.ShowExperimentalFeaturesHint: Your world may become unusable in a future release if you use these features. For testing only DO NOT use these in your game worlds
SETTINGS.CheckElevationHint: Use elevation in range combat distance calculations
Cd100.toolTipDelay: Millisecond delay before tooltip should show, 0 for never
SETTINGS.ChaseShowTokenMovementHint: Show movement on the grid when a token is moved to the next location.
SETTINGS.SceneDistanceNotCalculatedNoErr: Don't show error for ranged distance
When starting a ranged combat if playing theatre of the mind do not show the unable to calculate distance message.
Cd100.SETTINGS.LegacySpellCosts: Always show legacy spell costs system
Cd100.SETTINGS.LegacySpellCostsHint: Show the legacy spell cost entries even if they are empty
Cd100.Copied: Copied the Example Text to Clipboard
Cd100.EffectAppliedCantOverride: An active effect is applies. You can't modify [{name}]. Deactivate the corresponding effect to modify this value.
Cd100.InvestigatorWizard.Title: Investigator Creation Wizard
Cd100.InvestigatorWizard.Introduction: The Investigator Creation Wizard is a step-by-step process for creating a brand-new investigator.
Cd100.InvestigatorWizard.IntroductionKee: Your world is set to the "{era}" era this can be changed under settings or on the next page.
Cd100.InvestigatorWizard.PlayerEnabled: Allow players without actor creation permission to create investigators
Cd100.InvestigatorWizard.PlayerQuantity: How many investigators can one player have ownership of?
Cd100.InvestigatorWizard.OtherPlayerOwne: Default permission level for players that did not create this investigator
Cd100.InvestigatorWizard.ChooseAfterRoll: Choose where to place rolled characteristics
Cd100.InvestigatorWizard.SetupCounts: You currently have {count} setup options. It is recommended you set a single setup for all your players to set the default skills on your character sheet. The system comes with a default setup with a CoC ID set. You can add more setups with valid CoC ID values using the header on then setup item sheet. Compendiums with these values set will automatically be added to the available list.
Cd100.InvestigatorWizard.OccupationCount: You currently have {count} occupations. The system comes with a default occupation with a CoC ID set. You can add more occupations with valid CoC ID values using the header on then occupation item sheet. Compendiums with these values set will automatically be added to the available list.
Cd100.InvestigatorWizard.ArchetypeCounts: You currently have {count} archetypes. The system comes with a default archetypes with a CoC ID set. You can add more archetypes with valid CoC ID values using the header on then archetypes item sheet. Compendiums with these values set will automatically be added to the available list.
Cd100.InvestigatorWizard.SetupPage: Selecting your era will set the default skills on your character sheet.
Cd100.InvestigatorWizard.ArchetypePage: Selecting your character archetype will set additional default skills on your character sheet.
Cd100.InvestigatorWizard.AddBonusPointsT: Add {bonusPoints} bonus skill points divided among any of the following skills: {skills}
Cd100.InvestigatorWizard.MakeEDUImprovem: Make an improvement check for EDU
Cd100.InvestigatorWizard.RollTwiceForLuc: Roll a second time for luck
Cd100.InvestigatorWizard.OccupationPage: Occupations give you a set of bonus points to split between eight skills and credit rating
Cd100.InvestigatorWizard.SkillSpendOccup: You have selected {count} of {max} occupation skills, check with your Keeper before removing standard occupation skills.
Cd100.InvestigatorWizard.ArchetypeOption: Check with your keeper before selecting the following skills
Cd100.InvestigatorWizard.SkillSpendArche: You have selected {count} of {max} archetype skills, check with your Keeper before removing standard archetype skills.
Cd100.InvestigatorWizard.CreateInstructi: Click create to create your character. You Keeper needs to be online for the character to be created.
Cd100.InvestigatorWizard.CreatingInvesti: Please wait while the keeper creates your investigator.
Cd100.CoCIDFlag.title: Edit System ID (CoC ID)
Cd100.CoCIDFlag.summary: Set a group identifier that can be used to find the most up to date version of this {type}. The System ID should use the English translation of the {type} to support localization across all languages.
Cd100.CoCIDFlag.guess: Create System ID (CoC ID) based on current document.
Cd100.CoCIDFlag.others: Other documents with this CoC ID and language (excluding documents in other actors and items)
Cd100.CoCIDFlag.error.duplicate: Warning: Multiple System IDs with same priority!
Cd100.CoCIDFlag.error.incorrect.type: Tried to convert CoC ID with non existing document type. See console log.
Cd100.CoCIDFlag.error.documents-not-foun: Documents were not found in world or Compendia matching the CoC IDs ({cocids}), language "{lang}", and era "{era}". Please check your Era for the world setting.
Cd100.CoCIDBatch.title: Batch set System ID (CoC ID)
Cd100.CoCIDBatch.summary: The Cthulhu d100 System has introduced a System ID (CoC ID). This allows the system to identify FoundryVTT documents for example telling which skill on an Actor is Dodge. This page will allow you to set the id for existing {type} documents. The System ID should use the English translation of the name to support localization across all languages.
Cd100.CoCIDBatch.ThrowSkillChange: The CoC ID for "Fighting (Throw)", "Firearms (Throw)", and "Ranged (Throw)" are no longer needed, do you want to update the relevant skills in this world to "Throw"?
Cd100.ActorCoCIDItemsWarning: This action can not be undone, please backup your world before updating your Actors
Cd100.ActorCoCIDItemsWhich: Check Item's CoC ID in active compendiums, world compendiums, and Items directory replacing the Actor's Items with the best choice based on these rules
Cd100.ActorCoCIDItemsRules1: The Item must match the current era "{era}" or have no eras selected
Cd100.ActorCoCIDItemsRules2: Check Item's that match the language "{lang}" or "English" if no translated Items exist
Cd100.ActorCoCIDItemsRules3: Select the Item with the highest priority
Cd100.ActorCoCIDItemsSceneTokens: Update all tokens on this scene
Cd100.ActorCoCIDItemsUnlinkedToken: Update unlinked Actor in directory for each Token first
Cd100.CoCIDCompendiumPopulateWarning: This action can not be undone, please backup your module before populating it. Make sure your world era, language, and modules are set correctly.
Cd100.CoCIDCompendiumPopulateMissing: You do not have a module with an unlocked Item compendium

When set to hide set Document ownership to this level
When set to show set Journal Entry Page ownership to this level
Hide Permission for Journal Entry Pages
When set to hide set Journal Entry Page ownership to this level
